message:
fix: use pipe for Target.* commands to maintain session consistency

CDP sessions are transport-specific - a session created via WebSocket
is not valid on the pipe transport. Reverted Target.* commands
(switchToTarget, closeTarget) to use pipe instead of browser_ws
so that the session works with Page.* commands on the same transport.

Also:
- Fixed memory leak in response queue cleanup (race between unlock and join)
- Made CDP debug logging always enabled (append mode)
- Added detailed logging for WebSocket URL discovery
